description: CompositionWhite round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has fabric tape detailing on the inseam of the neckline, short sleeves and screen print on the chestFittingRegularWash careMachine wash in warm water with like colours only, using a mild detergentDo not bleachDry in shadeUse warm ironThis white t-shirt from spykar  is an essential in your wardrobe.
